tasks.subject: Backlog items: AI agent integration tests + E2E flakiness detection
tasks.description:
Implement backlog items #28 and #29:
- #28: Integration test coverage for AI agent features (US-107 Content Repurposing, US-108 Auto-Scheduling, US-109 SEO Auto-Optimize). Add test_repurpose.py, test_schedule.py, test_seo_optimize.py following existing patterns in backend/tests/.
- #29: E2E flakiness regression detection pre-commit check. Script that runs known flaky E2E tests and reports failures before commit.
